metadata.title: Praise to the Lord, the Almighty
metadata.subtitle: Joachim Neander (1680) — English tr. Catherine Winkworth (1863)
metadata.composer: Anonymous, tune "Lobe den Herren" from *Stralsund Gesangbuch* (1665)
metadata.lyricist: Joachim Neander (1650–1680); English translation by Catherine Winkworth (1827–1878)
metadata.x_pd_basis: Neander (d. 1680) and Winkworth (d. 1878) died > 140 years ago. Tune is anonymous from 1665
